_comment: Three-step claim → evidence → confirmed flow for a real CORS bug. Each step is a separate MCP call; the comments at the bottom show the order. Replace REPLACE_ME with your project name.

args.title: Suspect: missing CORS header on /api/upload
args.description: Build broke after refactor; preflight requests started failing in the browser. Suspect commit abc123 removed Access-Control-Allow-Headers for the upload route.

args.notes: CI green after re-adding Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization
User confirmed in PR review: 'yes, that header was load-bearing'
